info.title: Themis
info.description: Print queue API for the Themis 3D printing management system. Manages files, printers, jobs, projects, orders, queue, and settings. Requires the Laminus OrcaSlicer sidecar for slicing operations.

get.description:
All orders ordered by creation date descending. Each order includes derived
status (queued / in_progress / complete / hold) and progress fraction.

schema.title: Response List Orders Api V1 Orders Get
Response Create Order Api V1 Orders Post

get.description: Order detail including all non-cancelled jobs.

schema.title: Order Id
Response Get Order Api V1 Orders  Order Id  Get
Order Id
Response Patch Order Api V1 Orders  Order Id  Patch
Order Id

get.description: Available printer driver types with display name and required connection config fields.

schema.title: Response List Printer Types Api V1 Printers Types Get

get.description: All configured printers with their current connection status.

schema.title: Response List Printers Api V1 Printers Get

post.description:
Register a new printer and attempt an immediate connection. Connection failure
is non-fatal — the printer is saved and will retry on next restart.

schema.title: Response Create Printer Api V1 Printers Post

get.description: Sorted list of all OrcaSlicer machine preset names available in the sidecar catalog.

schema.title: Response List Orca Printer Presets Api V1 Printers Orca Presets Get

get.description:
Selectable OrcaSlicer machine presets [{name, vendor, printer_model, nozzle,
source, uuid}]. Sourced exclusively from the Orca sidecar.

schema.title: Response Orca Machine Catalog Api V1 Printers Orca Machine Catalog Get

post.description: Trigger a catalog refresh from Orca and report the machine preset count.

schema.title: Response Rescan Profiles Api V1 Printers Rescan Profiles Post

post.description:
Attempt to connect with the given config and return `{ok: true}` or
`{ok: false, error: "..."}` with a human-readable hint about why it failed.

schema.title: Response Test Connection Api V1 Printers Test Connection Post

get.description: OrcaSlicer print and filament profiles compatible with this printer's active machine preset.

schema.title: Printer Id
Response Get Profiles Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Profiles Get
Printer Id
Response Get Printer Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Get

patch.description:
Update one or more printer fields. Omitted fields are left unchanged.
`current_orca_printer_profile` supports explicit null to clear the preset.

schema.title: Printer Id
Response Update Printer Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Patch
Printer Id

post.description: Mark the printer's bed as cleared so the queue engine can assign the next job.

schema.title: Printer Id
Response Plate Cleared Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Plate Cleared Post

patch.description:
Change the active OrcaSlicer machine preset. The preset must already be in
the printer's `orca_printer_profiles` list.

schema.title: Printer Id
Response Switch Active Preset Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Active Preset Patch

422.description: Preset not in this printer's configured profiles

post.description: Disconnect the current session and open a fresh connection.

schema.title: Printer Id
Response Reconnect Printer Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Reconnect Post
Printer Id
Response Pause Printer Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Pause Post
Printer Id
Response Resume Printer Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Resume Post

post.description: Stop the active print and cancel any Themis job the printer was physically running.

schema.title: Printer Id
Response Stop Printer Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Stop Post
Printer Id
Response Set Light Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Light Post
Printer Id
Response Jog Z Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Jog Z Post

post.description: Set fan speed (0–100 %) for `model`, `auxiliary`, or `box` fan.

schema.title: Printer Id
Response Set Fan Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Fan Post
Printer Id
Response Set Bed Temp Api V1 Printers  Printer Id  Bed Temp Post

get.description:
MJPEG multipart stream from the printer camera. Supports both native MJPEG
and RTSP (transcoded via ffmpeg). A keepalive ping prevents stream drops on
printers that time out after 60 s of inactivity.

schema.title: Printer Id

404.description: Printer not found or has no camera

503.description: Printer not connected or ffmpeg unavailable for RTSP

get.description: Return a single JPEG frame from any camera source (MJPEG or RTSP).

schema.title: Printer Id

404.description: Printer not found, has no camera, or no camera source

503.description: Printer not connected or camera unavailable

get.description:
All printers with live telemetry (temperatures, progress, print state) merged in.
Offline or disconnected printers return a zeroed-out state block.

schema.title: Response List Fleet Api V1 Fleet Get

get.description:
All files in the library. Optional filters: `folder` (prefix match),
`tags` (all supplied tags must be present), `search` (filename substring).
`sort` accepts `updated` (default), `name`, or `size`.

schema.title: Folder
Search
Sort
Tags
Response List Files Api V1 Files Get

get.description:
Hierarchical folder tree derived from the file index. Each node has
`name`, `path`, `count` (files in this folder and below), and `children`.
Empty folders are not included — use `/dirs` for those.

schema.title: Response Folder Tree Api V1 Files Tree Get

get.description:
Folder hierarchy from the actual on-disk library directory — includes
EMPTY folders (unlike /tree, which is index-derived) — with recursive file
counts overlaid from the index. Used by the move-destination picker.

schema.title: Response Folder Dirs Api V1 Files Dirs Get

post.description:
Upload a .3mf or .stl file to the library. If identical content already exists
in the target folder the existing record is returned (deduplication by SHA-256).
Thumbnail generation is triggered in the background for .3mf files.

schema.title: Response Upload File Api V1 Files Upload Post

post.description: Create a directory in the library. Parent directories are created as needed.

schema.title: Response Create Folder Api V1 Files Folders Post

delete.description:
Delete an EMPTY folder. Refuses (409) if it contains any files or
subfolders, and never deletes the library root.

schema.title: Path
Response Delete Folder Api V1 Files Folders Delete

400.description: Cannot delete the library root or Job Uploads folder

patch.description:
Rename a file, move it to a different folder, or both. The destination folder
is created if it does not exist. Filename path separators are stripped to prevent
directory traversal.

schema.title: File Id
Response Update File Api V1 Files  File Id  Patch

400.description: Invalid filename or path escapes the library root

schema.title: File Id
Response Delete File Api V1 Files  File Id  Delete

409.description: File is referenced by an active job

post.description: Assign a tag to a file. Idempotent — no error if the tag is already assigned.

schema.title: File Id
Response Add File Tag Api V1 Files  File Id  Tags Post

delete.description: Remove a tag from a file. Idempotent — no error if the tag is not assigned.

schema.title: File Id
Tag Id
Response Remove File Tag Api V1 Files  File Id  Tags  Tag Id  Delete

post.description:
Walk the library directory and sync the file index — adds missing records,
marks orphaned records as missing, and re-parses plate metadata.

schema.title: Response Rescan Api V1 Files Rescan Post

get.description: Plate metadata extracted from the 3MF (estimated time, filament grams, thumbnail path).

schema.title: File Id
Response Get Plates Api V1 Files  File Id  Plates Get

get.description: Filament definitions embedded in the 3MF model XML (type, colour, vendor).

schema.title: File Id
Response Get Model Filaments Api V1 Files  File Id  Model Filaments Get

get.description: OrcaSlicer project settings embedded in `Metadata/project_settings.config` inside the 3MF.

schema.title: File Id
Response Get Embedded Settings Api V1 Files  File Id  Embedded Settings Get

get.description:
Return a PNG thumbnail for a specific plate. The filename is the basename
of the thumbnail path from the plates list.

schema.title: File Id
Filename

get.description: Serve the raw uploaded file (STL, 3MF, etc.) for client-side use.

schema.title: File Id

get.description: All jobs ordered by queue position. Includes jobs in all statuses.

schema.title: Response List Jobs Api V1 Jobs Get

post.description:
Queue a new print job for a specific file plate. At least one printer config is required.
The job is added at the end of the queue and the engine is woken immediately.

schema.title: Response Create Job Api V1 Jobs Post

404.description: File, printer, or order not found

post.description:
Flag settings baked into the uploaded 3MF that the chosen presets would
change, so the New Job flow can warn before slicing replaces them.

schema.title: Response Check Overrides Api V1 Jobs Check Overrides Post

get.description:
Completed/cancelled/failed jobs enriched with file name, printer name, and project name.
`status` is a comma-separated list; `project_id` filters to a single project.

schema.title: Status
Project Id
Limit
Response List History Api V1 Jobs History Get
Job Id
Response Get Job Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Get

get.description: Full job detail: file name, plate stats, per-printer slicing configs, assigned printer.

schema.title: Job Id
Response Get Job Details Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Details Get

post.description:
Cancel a queued, printing, paused, slicing, or failed job. If a printer is
physically running the job it receives a stop command. A parked gcode file is deleted.

schema.title: Job Id
Response Cancel Job Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Cancel Post

422.description: Job is in a non-cancellable status

patch.description: Replace printer configs for a queued/blocked/failed job and re-queue it.

schema.title: Job Id
Response Update Job Configs Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Configs Patch

422.description: Job is not in an editable status or printer_configs is empty

post.description:
Re-queue a blocked job at the top of the queue and wake the engine.

Clears any prior slice-failure flags so the job is actually re-sliced — a
config left with ``slice_failed`` would otherwise be re-blocked on the next
claim with its stale error, never retrying.

schema.title: Job Id
Response Unblock Job Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Unblock Post

422.description: Job is not in blocked status

post.description:
Move a queued or blocked job within the queue.
Actions: 'front', 'back', 'promote' (one step up), 'demote' (one step down).

schema.title: Job Id
Response Reorder Job Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Reorder Post

422.description: Job is not in a reorderable status or action is invalid

post.description:
Test-slice without printing or modifying job state. Debug use only.
Returns `{ok: true}` on success or `{ok: false, error: "..."}` on failure.

schema.title: Job Id
Response Verify Slice Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Verify Slice Post

404.description: Job, printer, file, or printer config not found

get.description: Printer configs that failed slicing, with the error message for each.

schema.title: Job Id
Response Get Slice Failures Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Slice Failures Get

put.description:
Record per-item pass/fail counts for a completed project job.
Increments `quantity_completed` and `quantity_failed` on each ProjectItem.
Calling again replaces the previous outcome (idempotent re-review).

schema.title: Job Id
Response Mark Job Outcome Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Outcome Put

400.description: Job has no project items to mark

get.description:
Return the full machine/process/filament catalog as JSON (served from the
Themis-side cache; the sidecar is only contacted if the cache is cold).

Whether the Themis catalog cache is populated and Laminus's build state.
Includes `laminus` sub-object with `catalog_loaded`, `catalog_building`, and
`profile_count` if the sidecar is reachable. Health result is memoized for 30 s.

schema.title: Response Get Catalog Status Api V1 Laminus Catalog Status Get

post.description:
Re-fetch the catalog from Laminus. If removed profiles are referenced by live data,
returns pending_remaps instead of committing. Old catalog remains active until confirmed.

schema.title: Response Refresh Catalog Api V1 Laminus Catalog Refresh Post

post.description:
Tell Laminus to rebuild its catalog from disk, then update the Themis cache.
If removed profiles are referenced by live data, returns pending_remaps.

schema.title: Response Rescan And Refresh Catalog Api V1 Laminus Catalog Rescan Post

504.description: Laminus catalog rebuild did not complete within 120 s

post.summary: Confirm pending profile remap and commit catalog

schema.title: Response Confirm Remap Api V1 Laminus Catalog Confirm Remap Post

get.description:
All projects ordered by creation date descending, each with items, links,
job counts, and aggregated filament/time estimates.

schema.title: Response List Projects Api V1 Projects Get
Response Create Project Api V1 Projects Post
Project Id
Response Get Project Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Get
Project Id
Response Patch Project Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Patch
Project Id
Response Delete Project Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Delete

get.description: All jobs belonging to this project, ordered by job ID.

schema.title: Project Id
Response List Project Jobs Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Jobs Get
Project Id
Response List Items Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Items Get
Project Id
Response Add Item Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Items Post
Project Id
Item Id
Response Update Item Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Items  Item Id  Put
Project Id
Item Id
Response Delete Item Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Items  Item Id  Delete

put.description: Set explicit sort_order values for project items. Returns the full updated item list.

schema.title: Project Id
Body
Response Reorder Items Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Items Reorder Put

422.description: One or more item IDs do not belong to this project

schema.title: Project Id
Response List Links Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Links Get
Project Id
Response Add Link Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Links Post
Project Id
Link Id
Response Update Link Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Links  Link Id  Put
Project Id
Link Id
Response Delete Link Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Links  Link Id  Delete

post.description:
Pack project STL items into 3MF files (one per filament group), save them to the library,
and queue one job per plate. Returns created job and file IDs plus the bed dimensions used
for packing.

schema.title: Project Id
Response Generate Project Api V1 Projects  Project Id  Generate Post

404.description: Project not found or a referenced file is missing

422.description: Project has no items or contains non-STL files

get.description:
All jobs in an active status (queued, slicing, uploading, printing, paused, blocked, failed)
ordered by queue position ascending.

schema.title: Response Get Queue Api V1 Queue Get

patch.description: Set explicit queue positions for one or more active jobs. Returns the full updated queue.

schema.title: Response Reorder Queue Api V1 Queue Reorder Patch

422.description: Job is not in an active status and cannot be reordered

get.description: Queue engine settings: poll interval, operator name, and snapshot interval.

put.description: Update one or more queue engine settings. Omitted fields are left unchanged.

get.description: Spoolman integration settings: enabled flag, base URL, and API key.

put.description: Update Spoolman integration settings. Omitted fields are left unchanged.

post.description:
Verify connectivity to Spoolman. Uses the supplied URL/key if provided,
falling back to the saved config. Returns `{ok, version}` or `{ok, message}`.
If the catalog is warm and stale UUIDs are detected in Spoolman filaments,
returns `{status: "pending_remaps", ...}` instead.

get.description: Outbound webhook settings: endpoint URL, HMAC secret, and subscribed event types.

put.description: Update webhook settings. Omitted fields are left unchanged.

get.description:
Export all printer configs as a downloadable JSON file.

The response has `Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=themis-fleet-backup.json`
so browsers will prompt to save it. Import with `POST /settings/fleet-import`.

post.description:
Import printer configs from a backup file. Profile resolution failures are non-fatal.

Returns a report with counts of imported and skipped printers plus any warnings
about unrecognised OrcaSlicer profile names.

get.description: Fetch all filament definitions from the configured Spoolman instance.

503.description: Spoolman not configured, disabled, or unreachable

get.description: Fetch all spool inventory from the configured Spoolman instance.

503.description: Spoolman not configured, disabled, or unreachable

patch.description: Write OrcaSlicer profile assignments back to a Spoolman filament's extra fields.

schema.title: Filament Id

503.description: Spoolman not configured, disabled, or unreachable

get.description: All tags ordered by category then name, each with a usage_count of how many files carry it.

schema.title: Response List Tags Api V1 Tags Get
Response Create Tag Api V1 Tags Post

409.description: A tag with this name already exists

schema.title: Tag Id
Response Update Tag Api V1 Tags  Tag Id  Patch

409.description: A tag with the requested name already exists

schema.title: Tag Id
Response Delete Tag Api V1 Tags  Tag Id  Delete
Response Health Api V1 Health Get
